data.description:

An announcement from Safilo Group SpA ( (IT:SFL) ) is now available.

Safilo Group has disclosed a management share transaction involving Vladimiro Baldin, who holds a managerial position within the company. Baldin subscribed to 150,000 Safilo ordinary shares at a price of €0.97 each, in a move tied to the company’s 2023-2025 stock option plan approved by shareholders.

The transaction, executed off-exchange on 29 June 2026, reflects the ongoing implementation of Safilo’s long-term incentive scheme for key managers. Such exercises typically signal alignment of management interests with shareholders and may be viewed as a sign of confidence in the group’s strategic trajectory and future performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SFL) stock is a Hold

Safilo Group SpA is an Italian eyewear company that designs, manufactures and distributes optical frames and sunglasses. The group operates globally, supplying branded eyewear products to both wholesale and retail channels, and is listed on public markets where its ordinary shares are actively traded.

National Bankshares, Inc. and its subsidiary, The National Bank of Blacksburg, have extended their relationship with F. Brad Denardo, the bank’s chairman and former president and chief executive officer, through a new consulting agreement effective July 1, 2026, and running through June 30, 2027. The deal, which continues an arrangement first established on March 31, 2025, provides Denardo a $6,000 monthly consulting fee and imposes standard noncompetition covenants, signaling the bank’s intention to retain his leadership experience and ensure continuity in strategic guidance for the organization and its stakeholders.

data.title: Greenpro Capital Settles Litigation, Exits MFAI Investment
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Greenpro Capital ( (GRNQ) ) just unveiled an update.

On June 24, 2026, Greenpro Capital Corp. entered into a confidential settlement agreement with Millennium Fine Art Inc., resolving all claims in a Nevada state court case and related arbitration tied to an alleged 2021 NFT-related contract. Under the settlement, subject to closing conditions, Greenpro will pay MFAI $100,000 and surrender 2,000,000 restricted Class B common shares, representing its entire equity interest of about 5% of MFAI’s issued shares and roughly 1% of its voting rights.

These shares were originally acquired on July 1, 2020 as consideration for Greenpro’s sale of its 4% stake in the 12.3-kilogram Millennium Sapphire, an asset in which MFAI holds full ownership. Following the exchange of the settlement consideration, the parties will dismiss the litigation and arbitration with prejudice, enter into mutual general releases, and the agreement specifies that its performance does not constitute an admission of liability; Greenpro’s board approved the settlement on June 15, 2026, and the move effectively terminates its investment relationship with MFAI while removing ongoing legal overhang.

More about Greenpro Capital

Greenpro Capital Corp. is a diversified investment and corporate advisory company that engages in strategic holdings and financial services, including interests in alternative assets such as precious stones and related ventures. The company has previously held an equity stake in Millennium Fine Art Inc. (MFAI) through restricted Class B common shares obtained as consideration for the sale of a minority interest in the Millennium Sapphire asset.

Average Trading Volume: 28,428

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $27.63M

FirstGroup plc has published its 2026 Annual Report and Financial Statements, together with the notice of its 2026 Annual General Meeting and related proxy materials, and has filed these documents with the Financial Conduct Authority’s National Storage Mechanism. An update from TOC Property Backed Lending Trust ( (GB:DVNO) ) is now available.

Develop North PLC, an investment company listed on the London Stock Exchange, targets stable income and medium to long-term total returns for shareholders through a diversified regional portfolio. It concentrates on projects in the North East of England while also investing across the wider North of England and Scotland, combining the financial strength of a listed vehicle with the flexibility of a local business.

The company has entered a closed period under EU Market Abuse Regulation that will last until it releases half-year results for the period ended 31 May 2026. Develop North stated that all inside information held up to the date of the announcement has already been disclosed via a Regulatory Information Service, meaning it is not restricted from dealing in its own securities during the closed period provided no new undisclosed inside information arises.

Spark’s Take on DVNO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DVNO is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weaker 2025 fundamentals (sharp net income decline, higher leverage, and free cash flow falling to zero) despite strong revenue growth. Offsetting this, the technical setup is moderately positive with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, and valuation is attractive with a low P/E and high dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on DVNO stock,
click here.

More about TOC Property Backed Lending Trust

Develop North PLC is an investment company listed on the London Stock Exchange that aims to deliver consistent, stable income and attractive total returns over the medium to long term. It focuses on a diversified portfolio of investments predominantly in the North East of England, and since its 2017 IPO has deployed almost £90 million across the North of England and Scotland, supporting an estimated 12,000 jobs and projects with a gross development value exceeding £280 million.

data.title: CICT Completes Paragon Deal and Fully Deploys S$750 Million Placement
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

CapitaLand Investment Limited ( (SG:9CI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

CapitaLand Integrated Commercial Trust has completed the acquisition of Paragon, securing 100% ownership of the Paragon Trust and Orchard 290, which together represent the full freehold interest in the prime Orchard Road asset. This move consolidates CICT’s position in Singapore’s high-end retail and commercial property market, potentially enhancing its income stability and reinforcing its role as a leading integrated commercial REIT.

The trust has fully deployed the approximately S$750 million raised via a private placement, with about S$740.5 million used to partially finance the Paragon acquisition and associated costs, and S$9.5 million for transaction-related expenses. The efficient redeployment of funds, including interim use for debt repayment, underscores disciplined capital management and signals to unitholders that the equity raise has been promptly converted into a yielding asset, reducing execution risk around the deal.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:9CI) stock is a Buy
with a S$3.10 price target.

More about CapitaLand Investment Limited

CapitaLand Integrated Commercial Trust is a Singapore-listed real estate investment trust focused on integrated commercial properties, including retail and office assets. Managed by CapitaLand Integrated Commercial Trust Management Limited, it invests in income-producing real estate to deliver stable distributions to unitholders, with a portfolio anchored in prime locations such as Orchard Road.

Noba Bank Group AB ( (SE:NOBA) ) has provided an update.

NOBA Bank Group AB has raised SEK 200 million by tapping its outstanding senior preferred bonds maturing in June 2029, issued under its SEK 10 billion MTN programme. The new tranche, carrying interest at 3 months STIBOR plus 1.00% and arranged with SEB as lead manager, supports NOBA’s ongoing funding strategy and balance-sheet flexibility.

The transaction underlines NOBA’s access to capital markets and reinforces its position as a diversified Nordic lender serving over two million customers through brands including Nordax Bank and Bank Norwegian. By securing additional long-term funding, the group strengthens its capacity to offer sustainable, specialized financial solutions to individuals and SMEs across its eight active markets.

More about Noba Bank Group AB

NOBA Bank Group AB is a Nordic financial services group operating through four brands: Nordax Bank, Bank Norwegian, Svensk Hypotekspension and DBT. The group focuses on specialized, customer-centric financial offerings aimed at promoting financial health for individuals and SMEs across eight markets, and its shares are listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.

data.title: Essentra updates market on total voting rights and share capital
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An update from Essentra ( (GB:ESNT) ) is now available.

Essentra plc has reported that as of 30 June 2026 its issued share capital comprised 287,420,301 ordinary shares of 25 pence each, of which 3,534,057 are held in treasury and therefore do not confer voting rights. This leaves 283,886,244 ordinary shares in circulation with voting rights, a figure the company is highlighting as the key denominator for investors and other parties when assessing whether they must disclose shareholdings or changes under U.K. transparency rules.

By clarifying the number of voting shares in issue, Essentra is providing updated guidance to shareholders and market participants on the appropriate reference base for regulatory notifications. The announcement underscores the company’s adherence to the Financial Conduct Authority’s disclosure and transparency framework, helping ensure accurate reporting of significant shareholdings and supporting transparency in its shareholder register.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ESNT) stock is a Buy
with a £130.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Essentra stock,
see the GB:ESNT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ESNT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ESNT is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak profitability and deteriorating cash flow trends, alongside a very high P/E multiple. Technical indicators also lean bearish with the price below key moving averages and a negative MACD, while the balance sheet and dividend yield provide only modest support.

To see Spark’s full report on ESNT stock,
click here.

More about Essentra

Essentra plc is a U.K.-listed company whose shares trade on the London market, with an issued share capital composed of ordinary shares of 25 pence each. The company maintains a portion of its ordinary shares in treasury, which do not carry voting rights and are excluded from the free float used for regulatory disclosure calculations.

data.title: Mueller Industries Completes Two-for-One Stock Split
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An update from Mueller Industries ( (MLI) ) is now available.

On June 1, 2026, Mueller Industries, Inc. announced a two-for-one forward stock split of its issued common stock, to be implemented via an amendment to its Restated Certificate of Incorporation in Delaware. On June 29, 2026, the company filed this amendment, increasing its authorized common shares from 250 million to 500 million, with the change becoming effective at 4:01 p.m. Eastern Time that day.

Following these actions, Mueller Industries’ stock is set to begin trading on a split-adjusted basis at the market open on July 1, 2026, effectively doubling the number of shares outstanding while halving the price per share. This move is expected to enhance liquidity and broaden investor access to the stock, potentially supporting trading activity and reinforcing the company’s presence in the equity markets.

Spark’s Take on MLI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MLI is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial quality—minimal leverage, strong returns, and robust free cash flow—tempered by signs of recent margin/cash-flow cooling. Technicals are a mild headwind given the stock is below key short-term moving averages, while valuation is reasonable and corporate actions (split and dividend) add modest support.

To see Spark’s full report on MLI stock,
click here.

More about Mueller Industries

Mueller Industries, Inc. is a U.S.-based manufacturer operating in the industrial sector, with a focus on producing and supplying metal and engineered products. The company’s common stock is widely held and traded, making capital market actions such as stock splits a relevant tool for managing share structure and investor accessibility.

Average Trading Volume: 696,932

data.title: ACCESS Newswire shareholders affirm directors and auditor appointments
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.

ACCESS Newswire ( (ACCS) ) has shared an announcement.

On June 26, 2026, ACCESS Newswire Inc. held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders with 2,963,064 of 3,885,676 eligible shares represented, establishing a quorum for corporate decision-making. Shareholders elected four directors—Brian R. Balbirnie, Wesley T. Pollard, Graeme P. Rein and Joseph A. Staples—to serve until the next annual meeting or until successors are chosen, reinforcing continuity in the company’s leadership.

Investors also ratified the audit committee’s appointment of Cherry Bekaert LLP as independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026, with 2,653,094 votes in favor and limited opposition. The outcomes underscore shareholder support for the current governance structure and financial oversight, which may provide stability and predictability for stakeholders as the company executes its strategy.
